title: ID Fresh Food is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: ID Fresh Food is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate E-commerce Executive with drive and ambition, ID Fresh Food in Chandigarh is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ID Fresh Food:
ID Fresh Food is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ID Fresh Food!
